Bash(python3 -c "
import json
token = json.load\(open\('data/strava_token.json'\)\)
a = token.get\('athlete', {}\)
print\('resource_state:', a.get\('resource_state'\)\)
print\('ftp:', a.get\('ftp'\)\)
print\('scope in token:', token.get\('scope', 'not stored'\)\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
import json, urllib.request
token = json.load\(open\('data/strava_token.json'\)\)
req = urllib.request.Request\(
    'https://www.strava.com/api/v3/athlete',
    headers={'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + token['access_token']}
\)
with urllib.request.urlopen\(req\) as r:
    data = json.loads\(r.read\(\)\)
    print\('resource_state:', data.get\('resource_state'\)\)
    print\('ftp:', data.get\('ftp'\)\)
    print\('premium/summit:', data.get\('premium'\), data.get\('summit'\)\)
")
